option_line: BFIN_start3b:"Did this collector not make a large enough tithe?"
original: Did this collector not make a large enough tithe?

"No," he says, looking up. "That would have been simple. This object, this 'relic', is by all appearances still untouched on Tartessus, in the archives of the Cathedral of Holy Exodus."

"The curates of the archive were in some panic at word that they had lost a holy relic. They checked very, very carefully. I too have personally confirmed that it remains in their keeping."

option_line: BFIN_start4a:"So it's a fake. No problem."
original: So it's a fake. No problem.

option_line: BFIN_start4b:"And this is embarrassing to the Church?"
original: And this is embarrassing to the Church?
"Ah," he gives a weary smile. "The collector is quite secular, and has no relationship with the Church."

"But it could be," $global.jethroName says hesitantly. "It raises... questions."

"And those may become a problem. It is a complex situation and potentially dangerous."

"It could be," $global.jethroName says. "This collector has not been silent about his new acquisition."

"Naturally, the Church does not approve. At the same time, mere disapproval is no reason to cause a diplomatic incident, to say nothing of... well, it is a complex situation. And potentially dangerous."

"If you choose to assist me," he says, "then I shall share with you what, ah, 'intel' I have managed to piece together."

He looks almost embarrassed for a moment, then forces himself proceed. "Credits, yes. I have also been instructed to offer a payment of 50,000 credits when - if - you join my investigation, and an additional 50,000 credits upon completion of my quest."

"If it is possible." He sighs, "And that I cannot promise."

option_line: BFIN_remindReward:"Remind me, there was mention of payment..."
original: Remind me, there was mention of payment...

option_line: BFIN_askConflicts:"Now that I've agreed, I need to know of any potential factional conflicts."
original: Now that I've agreed, I need to know of any potential factional conflicts.
